product_overview: Instructor-facing module for SIGERD that provides secure authentication, an instructor dashboard with metrics, and the ability to report and track incidents (including image evidence) via a modal form on the incidents list view.
core_goals: Provide secure instructor authentication and protect instructor routes
Allow instructors to create incident reports with required validations and image evidence
Ensure instructors can view and track only their own incidents
Surface relevant dashboard metrics and handle zero-data and error states gracefully
Enforce backend validation for file types and size limits

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate as an instructor to gain access to protected instructor areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Submit login form -> See redirection to /instructor/dashboard and access granted
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See validation error 'These credentials do not match our records.'
Navigate to /login -> Leave email or password blank -> Submit login form -> See validation errors requiring both fields
Visit /instructor/incidents without authentication -> See redirect to /login

features.name: Instructor Dashboard
features.description: Display instructor-specific metrics and summary information on the instructor dashboard.
user_flows: Authenticate as instructor -> Navigate to /instructor/dashboard -> See dashboard metrics load without errors
Authenticate as instructor with no prior reports -> Navigate to /instructor/dashboard -> See metrics displayed as 0 where appropriate
Visit /instructor/dashboard without authentication -> See redirect to /login

features.name: Report Incident (Create)
features.description: Create a new incident report from the incidents list view using a modal form, including attaching image evidence with backend validation.
user_flows: Authenticate as instructor -> Navigate to /instructor/incidents -> Open new incident form modal -> Fill title -> Fill description -> Provide location -> Attach one or more valid image files under 2048 KB each -> Submit incident form -> See success confirmation and new incident appears in my list with status pending review

Authenticate as instructor -> Navigate to /instructor/incidents -> Open new incident form modal -> Fill required text fields but do not attach any image -> Submit incident form -> See backend validation error requiring at least one image

Authenticate as instructor -> Navigate to /instructor/incidents -> Open new incident form modal -> Leave the title blank and attach a valid image -> Submit incident form -> See validation error requiring the title field

Authenticate as instructor -> Navigate to /instructor/incidents -> Open new incident form modal -> Attach an image file larger than 2048 KB -> Submit incident form -> See error preventing upload due to file size limit

Authenticate as instructor -> Navigate to /instructor/incidents -> Open new incident form modal -> Attach a file with a disallowed extension (e.g. .php) -> Submit incident form -> See rejection due to invalid MIME type or extension
Visit /instructor/incidents without authentication -> See redirect to /login

features.name: Incidents List & Tracking
features.description: View and follow incidents submitted by the authenticated instructor; the list is filtered to show only the instructor's own reports.
user_flows: Authenticate as instructor -> Navigate to /instructor/incidents -> See list populated with incidents belonging only to the authenticated instructor
Authenticate as instructor when DB contains incidents from other users -> Navigate to /instructor/incidents -> See that incidents not owned by the authenticated instructor are not displayed
Visit /instructor/incidents without authentication -> See redirect to /login
